features.title: Hard gate on artifact validation
steps: coordinator.md has BLOCKING language for validate-artifacts
Language says STOP immediately if missing
Language says Do NOT continue to next round
evidence: BLOCKING language at coordinator.md step 19 and Evaluator Enforcement section

features.title: Auto-set status to complete
steps: checkStop() writes state.json status=complete when all pass
checkStop() sets stop_reason when all pass
Script change verified by running check-stop

features.title: Handoff cleanup after resume
steps: coordinator.md has handoff deletion after successful resume
evidence: Handoff Cleanup subsection at coordinator.md lines 194-196

features.title: Mode mismatch warning
steps: run.md preconditions check spec mode vs state mode
evidence: run.md lines 22-23 contain mode mismatch warning

features.title: Coordinator respects sprint grouping
steps: coordinator.md instructs reading spec.md sprint grouping
Coordinator targets grouped features not individual
Language is explicit about reading execution strategy
evidence: coordinator.md step 4 lines 92-94 contain sprint grouping instruction
